---
title: "IAVS-LAC section"
description: |
  This website, managed by the Steering committee of the Latin America and the Carribean section of the International Association for Vegetation Science, will be used to share the most important information about our community"
site: distill::distill_website
---


## Purpose of the section

Historically, vegetation science from the region Latin America and the Carribean has been largely understudied, and much of the science comes from researchers from other regions.
The IAVS-LAC section aim at promoting vegetation science in the region, and to re-equilibrate the relationships between regional and global researchers.

## Steering Committee

### Marius Bottin

Researcher at the Humboldt Institute in Colombia.


## Annual Reports


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Learn more about creating websites with Distill at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/website.html

# Learn more about publishing to GitHub Pages at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/publish_website.html#github-pages

```
